step.title: Generate Scaffold goal (goal-002)
step.rule: Step 1 must have completed successfully (goal-001 created) before this step executes.
Scaffold is always goal-002 with phase=scaffold, depends_on=[goal-001] (G-02).
All inputs are read from docs/architecture/* files and templates on disk — never from conversation context (G-16).
See the <conventions> block in the spine.

substep.title: Resolve scaffold template
substep.action: Attempt to read the language-specific overlay template first, then fall back to base:
Store the resolved template content as SCAFFOLD_TEMPLATE. Record which tier was used (overlay or base).
substep.rule: Directory structure and Share namespace layout MUST come from the resolved template, not hardcoded in this XML.

substep.title: Read architecture inputs
substep.action: Read the following files and extract structured data:

read.extract: All level-3 headings under "## Bounded Context Inventory" — these are the BC names for DDD directory structure and Deptrac layers.
Composer package names from the file. If file does not exist, fall back to .tmux-cli/templates/php-symfony/libraries.md.
.env.test variable names and values for SC-10.

substep.action: Read Deptrac layer template from .tmux-cli/templates/php-symfony/bounded-contexts.md (lines 79-128) for DomainAndShare composite layer pattern and ruleset.
Read quality tool configs from .tmux-cli/templates/php-symfony/quality-gates.md for PHPStan level 9, ECS, and Deptrac enforcement commands.

substep.title: Compose acceptance criteria (SC-01..SC-13 + conditional SC-17..SC-24)
substep.action: Build ACCEPTANCE array with the 13 base scaffold criteria from docs/task-plan-spec.md:420-434 (plus the conditional criteria below):

criteria.item: composer.json contains all packages from docs/architecture/ decisions
composer install completes without errors (exit code 0)
DDD directory structure exists for every BC from discovery: src/{BC}/Domain/, src/{BC}/Application/, src/{BC}/Infrastructure/
Share namespace exists: src/Share/ with DataType, Event, Exception, Messaging subdirectories
bin/console boots without errors (exit code 0)
vendor/bin/phpunit runs with zero tests, zero errors (exit code 0)
vendor/bin/phpstan analyse src/ --level=9 passes on empty project (exit code 0)
vendor/bin/ecs check src/ passes on empty project (exit code 0)
vendor/bin/deptrac analyse passes with no violations on empty structure (exit code 0)
.env.test exists with variables matching docs/architecture/test-environment.md
phpunit.xml has separate unit and integration test suites configured
Deptrac config has DDD layers: Domain (depends on nothing + Share), Application (depends on DomainAndShare), Infrastructure (depends on DomainAndShare + Application), Share (depends on nothing)
Deptrac config groups Domain + Share into {BC}DomainAndShare composite layer (previo2 pattern using bool collector with must/must_not)
bin/ensure-test-stack.sh exists, is executable, runs: stack up → test-env migrations → test fixtures
Compose spec or .env.test pins APP_ENV=test for the E2E-facing service (E2E-ENV-CONV)
Playwright Chromium browser binary installed — npx playwright install --with-deps chromium exits 0
playwright.config.ts exists with trace retain-on-failure, screenshot only-on-failure, reporter [['list'],['html',{open:'never'}]], outputDir test-results, retries: 0, and test-results/ in .gitignore
playwright.config.ts defines a setup project (auth.setup.ts → playwright/.auth/*.json storageState) and an authenticated project with setup dependency (E2E-AUTH-STATE-CONV)
.env.test contains MAILER_DSN=null://null (Symfony recipe default, asserted by E2E-SIDEFX-CONV)
config/packages/test/messenger.yaml exists and routes transports to sync:// (E2E-SIDEFX-CONV)

substep.rule: All 13 criteria (plus SC-17/SC-18 when HAS_DATABASE, SC-19 when Playwright available, SC-20 when HAS_FRONTEND, SC-21 when HAS_FRONTEND AND N_auth_flows>=1, SC-23 when SIGNALS.has_mailer == yes, SC-24 when SIGNALS.has_messenger == yes) must be present as individual strings in the acceptance array — no omissions, no merging.

substep.title: Compose validation commands
substep.action: Build VALIDATE array with 6 base CLI commands (+ conditional SC-17/SC-18/SC-19/SC-20/SC-21/SC-23/SC-24 cmds) that verify the scaffold is functional:
substep.rule: These commands are emitted BARE (CMD-CONV): in local mode the daemon runs them on the host (Gate 0 having verified host Composer); in docker mode the daemon wraps them into the {{APP_SVC}} container started by task-R, so no host PHP/Composer is required.

substep.title: Compose context with Investigation Config and fan-out hints
substep.action: Build CONTEXT string with these sections:
substep.section: Scaffold creates a bootable, TDD-ready Symfony skeleton with DDD directory structure, quality tools, and Share namespace. All BC names come from docs/architecture/bounded-contexts.md. Composer packages from docs/architecture/libraries.md. Deptrac layer definitions and {BC}DomainAndShare composite from .tmux-cli/templates/php-symfony/bounded-contexts.md. Quality tool configs (PHPStan level 9, ECS, Deptrac) from .tmux-cli/templates/php-symfony/quality-gates.md. Test environment variables from docs/architecture/test-environment.md.

section.name: fan-out-hints
section.action: Build fan-out hints for multi-task execution (4 file-disjoint tasks; task-3 conditional on HAS_DATABASE; + task-R prepended when RUN_TARGET=docker per DOCKER-RUNTIME-FRONTLOAD):

task.name: Composer setup
task.scope: composer.json with all packages + composer install

task.name: DDD directory structure
task.scope: Create DDD directories per BC + Share namespace

task.name: Config files and quality tools
task.scope: phpunit.xml, phpstan.neon, ecs.php, deptrac.yaml, .env.test, APP_ENV=test pinning in Compose spec or .env.test (conditional on HAS_DATABASE, E2E-ENV-CONV SC-18), Playwright browser provisioning (conditional on Playwright available), playwright.config.ts + .gitignore test-results/ entry (conditional on HAS_FRONTEND), playwright.config.ts setup project + authenticated project + playwright/.auth/ gitignore (conditional on HAS_FRONTEND AND N_auth_flows>=1, E2E-AUTH-STATE-CONV SC-21), config/packages/test/messenger.yaml (conditional on SIGNALS.has_messenger == yes, E2E-SIDEFX-CONV SC-24)
task.criteria: SC-06, SC-07, SC-08, SC-09, SC-10, SC-11, SC-12, SC-13, SC-18 (conditional), SC-19 (conditional), SC-20 (conditional), SC-21 (conditional), SC-23 (conditional), SC-24 (conditional)

task.name: Ensure-stack script
task.scope: bin/ensure-test-stack.sh — three-phase stack-readiness script (stack up → test-env migrations → test fixtures)

section.rule: File-disjoint: task-0 owns composer root, task-1 owns src/*/, task-2 owns config root files, task-3 owns bin/ensure-test-stack.sh. task-R (docker mode) owns docker-compose.yaml + the dev Dockerfile. Zero overlap.
SC-05 (bin/console boots) is verified after ALL tasks complete — it depends on both Composer packages and Symfony kernel config.

section.name: investigation-config

investigator.name: Composer check
investigator.pass: Exit 0 — composer.json is valid and all dependencies resolved

investigator.name: Kernel boot
investigator.fail: Kernel boot error or missing service configuration

investigator.name: Quality tools
investigator.commands: vendor/bin/phpstan analyse --level=9 && vendor/bin/ecs check src/ && vendor/bin/deptrac analyse
investigator.pass: All three commands exit 0 — zero errors, zero violations
investigator.fail: Any tool reports errors or violations

investigator.name: Test runner
investigator.pass: Exit 0, zero errors — test suites discovered and run successfully
investigator.fail: Test discovery failure, errors, or non-zero exit

section.rule: Minimum 4 investigators for scaffold (GM-08). Each has type, commands, pass/fail criteria (GM-09).

substep.title: Compose not-in-scope
substep.value: Application code, domain logic, controller actions, fixtures, E2E tests, Playwright setup — all handled by subsequent goals (goal-003+).

substep.title: Call goal-create MCP
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with these parameters:

params.param: Create bootable TDD-ready Symfony skeleton with DDD structure, quality tools, and Share namespace

ACCEPTANCE array from substep 2.3 (base 13 items SC-01..SC-13, +SC-17 when HAS_DATABASE, +SC-18 when HAS_DATABASE (G2), +SC-19 when Playwright available, +SC-20 when HAS_FRONTEND, +SC-21 when HAS_FRONTEND AND N_auth_flows>=1 (G6), +SC-23 when SIGNALS.has_mailer == yes (G7), +SC-24 when SIGNALS.has_messenger == yes (G7))
VALIDATE array from substep 2.4 (6 base commands + conditional SC-17/SC-18/SC-19/SC-20/SC-21/SC-23/SC-24 cmds)
CONTEXT string from substep 2.5 (purpose + fan-out hints)
Array of {name,type,paths,commands,pass,fail,condition?} objects built from substep 2.5's investigators (2-4; types from the Reference Table). Omit conditional investigators whose condition is false.

SCOPE array — see the <scope-derivation> rule in the spine <conventions> block. Scaffold lays down the repo-wide skeleton (config/, composer.json, src/Share/**, quality-tool configs) and runs before any BC goal, so OMIT scope (unknown ⇒ serialized — correct for the skeleton goal).

substep.rule: Description is 97 characters — within the 120-char limit (MaxGoalDescriptionLength).
max_retries=3 — scaffold has fewer independent failure categories than Gate 0.

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "Scaffold created: goal-002 (phase=scaffold, depends_on=[goal-001]) with 4 investigators, 4 fan-out tasks (task-3 conditional on HAS_DATABASE; + task-R when RUN_TARGET=docker), max_retries=3"
Proceed to Step 3 (when added by subsequent tasks).
